creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the report, this has been fixed in the following revisions: 

- r319892: Added print/latex-ifluatex 
- r319894: Updated textproc/hs-pandoc to depend on print/latex-ifluatex 
and print/ifxetex 

I tried and it works for me now. 

Note that printf/ifxetex can be installed without problems, because the 
FreeBSD mirrors still have its source tarball, but it is indeed a bit 
outdated.
